metaDesc: Flash your TigerScale firmware directly from the browser. No Arduino IDE, no command line.
heroTagline:
Flash your TigerScale firmware directly from the browser.
No Arduino IDE, no command line, no toolchain.
warningBody: ESP Web Tools requires the Web Serial API, which only works in Chrome, Edge, Brave, or Opera. Please open this page in one of those.
step1Title: 1 · Plug in your ESP32 via USB
step1Body: Use a data cable (not charge-only). Your ESP32 should be detectable by the operating system.
step2Body: A popup asks which serial port to use. Pick your ESP32 — typically cu.usbserial-XXXX on macOS, COMx on Windows, or ttyUSB0 on Linux.
step3Body: The browser flashes the firmware (1.3 MB) and the web interface (900 KB). Don't unplug while it runs.
step4Body: The scale boots into setup mode. Connect your phone to the Setup-TigerScale-XXXX Wi-Fi and follow the captive portal.
whatItem1: Firmware (~1.3 MB) — the C++ code that runs on the ESP32
whatItem2: Web interface (~900 KB) — the page you'll see at tigerscale-XXXX.local
whatNote: Your existing settings (Wi-Fi, Firebase login, calibration) are preserved across firmware updates.
trustTitle: Don't trust the browser to flash your device?
trustIntro: The TigerScale firmware is fully open-source. You can:
trustItem1: Read every line of code on GitHub
trustItem2: Compile and flash it yourself with PlatformIO or Arduino IDE
trustItem3: Verify the SHA256 of the published binaries against your own build
trustOutro: The Web Installer is just a convenience layer — it uses the Web Serial API sandboxed by your browser. The page only sees your USB device when you explicitly grant access via the browser popup.
footerCredit: Built with ESP Web Tools · MIT License
shopIntro: Everything you need to build your TigerScale. Affiliate links — buying through them helps fund the project at no extra cost to you.
shopWiresDesc: ELEGOO 120 pcs 28 AWG 20 cm (M-M, M-F, F-F)
shopLoadDesc: Wishiot 5 kg high-precision load cell with HX711 amplifier
shopDisclosure: Full BOM and 3D-printable parts: hardware/BOM.md · As an Amazon Associate, we earn from qualifying purchases.
shopActiveShaftDesc: Bambu Lab AMS active shaft (drives the spool rotation)
shopDrivenShaftDesc: Bambu Lab AMS driven shaft (spool follower)
